name: Inflection-2
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (architecture undisclosed; trained at ~10^25 FLOPs)
note: Trained on 5,000 H100 GPUs at ~10^25 FLOPs; billed at launch as the second-most-capable LLM in the world, beating PaLM 2 Large.

results.notes: Independent comparison table; Inflection-2 ranked 2nd behind GPT-4 (86.4), just above Claude-2 CoT (78.5). Literally confirmed on page. [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]
10-shot HellaSwag. Literally confirmed: page text states 'Inflection-2 reaches 89.0 on HellaSwag 10-shot compared to GPT-4's 95.3.'

Confirmed via direct raw-HTML fetch (not summarized) of the SEJ article: literal text 'MBPP Scores: LLaMA-2 70B: 45.0 | PaLM-2S: 50.0 | Inflection-2: 53.0' appears verbatim in the page body, relaying Inflection AI's own published chart (the inflection.ai/inflection-2 blog page shows the same data only as an unreadable chart image, so this press relay is the only text-form citation found). Labeled self-reported per the corpus's existing convention for this same source/page (aggregator relay of a vendor-published figure, not an independent re-measurement).

Confirmed via direct raw-HTML fetch of the SEJ article: literal text 'These are the scores: LLaMA-2 70B: 29.9 | PaLM-2S: 37.6 | Inflection-2: 44.5 | GPT-4: 67.0' appears verbatim in the page body under the HumanEval section, relaying Inflection AI's own published chart. Labeled self-reported per the corpus's existing convention for this source.

GSM8k, 8-shot (with chain-of-thought, per the page's stated methodology), from Table 4 (math/coding benchmarks) on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/oZzGcrq1z1UxYXFVWgk83eN5sE.svg) with no extractable text layer; confirmed by directly rendering the asset in a browser (full table: LLaMA-2-70B=56.8, Grok-1=62.9, PaLM-2-L=80.7, GPT-4=92.0, Inflection-1=62.9[matches existing tracked value], Inflection-2=81.4). This supersedes an earlier research pass's attempted GSM8K figure of 89.3 for Inflection-2, which this corpus correctly dropped as unverifiable chart-only data (per this model's verificationNotes) -- 81.4 is the actual, now-confirmed value from the chart.

TriviaQA, Wikipedia split, 1-shot, from Table 3 (question-answering benchmarks) on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/CoBFTzzwHyvV2PIacD2qAnuiE0.svg); confirmed by directly rendering the asset in a browser (full row: LLaMA-2=85.0, PaLM-2-Large=86.1, Inflection-1=85.0[consistent with the existing Inflection-1 entry's noted 'up to 85.0 on the Wikipedia split, 1-shot'], Inflection-2=87.2). This supersedes an earlier research pass's attempted TriviaQA figure of 86.3 for Inflection-2, which this corpus correctly dropped as unverifiable chart-only data -- 87.2 is the actual, now-confirmed value.

PIQA, 0-shot, Inflection-2 column of Table 2 on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Rendered as a vector-outlined SVG image (framerusercontent.com/images/WcZyvwpmgQWfv7sUpfkL0mY3N8.svg), confirmed by direct browser rendering: full row reads HellaSwag(0)=87.1, HellaSwag(1)=87.7, PIQA(0)=84.2, PIQA(1)=85.0, LAMBADA(1)=86.5, ARC-E(1)=91.3, ARC-C(1)=70.7 for Inflection-2.

ARC-Easy, 1-shot, Inflection-2 column of Table 2 on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Same SVG table as the piqa entry (framerusercontent.com/images/WcZyvwpmgQWfv7sUpfkL0mY3N8.svg), confirmed by direct browser rendering.

ARC-Challenge, 1-shot, Inflection-2 column of Table 2 on Inflection AI's official Inflection-2 launch page. Same SVG table as the piqa entry (framerusercontent.com/images/WcZyvwpmgQWfv7sUpfkL0mY3N8.svg), confirmed by direct browser rendering. Note this is a 1-shot setting (much lower than the 25-shot ARC-Challenge convention used for the Inflection-1/Inflection-2.5 entries elsewhere in this batch) -- no 25-shot ARC-Challenge figure for Inflection-2 itself was found on any Inflection AI page.

verificationNotes: Confirmed model is real; training-completion/announcement dated Nov 22-28 2023 across sources (Forbes article dated Nov 22, 2023), consistent with record. DROPPED three result rows that could not be confirmed as literal text on the cited inflection.ai/inflection-2 page: self-reported MMLU 86.8, GSM8K 89.3, and TriviaQA 86.3. Direct full-text fetch of that page (twice) found these benchmark tables are presented only as chart IMAGES — the numeric strings '86.8', '89.3', and '86.3' do not appear anywhere in the page's actual text/markdown, and no alternate source could locate a text-form citation of these exact figures. Kept HellaSwag 89 (literally stated as '89.0' in body text) and independent MMLU 79.6 (literally confirmed on searchenginejournal.com's comparison table).
